0.response: {"Q0":"I tried to choose the universe that had better probability most of the time. I also tried to avoid the red and yellow planets when they were not useful to me. I tried to be fast when I was revealing the gem on the planets, but I also tried to be very accurate. "}

7.response: {"Q0":"I tried to typically choose the galaxy that gave a better probability. "}

1.response: {"Q0":"Once the red planet became worthless, I avoided uncovering gems on those planets. "}

5.response: {"Q0":"At one point I did because I forgot the astronaut left. "}

8.response: {"Q0":"I was more focused on selecting galaxies since the time for this was so limited. If I did not focus on the galaxy aspect more, I would not have enough time to make a decision.  "}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes, I received a message, and it referred to the red planet and red gems. "}

4.response: {"Q0":"yes, once the astronaut left, the gems on that particular planet could not be sold. "}

10.response: {"Q0":"sometimes the buttons to choose the galaxies changed their meaning, so sometimes the A button would choose the upper galaxy and other times it would choose the lower galaxy. "}

11.response: {"Q0":"thank you for this opportunity! this game was fun to play. I enjoyed being able to influence my bonus as well. The controls for choosing the galaxies need to be more reliable, but besides that, I did not have any issues. "}
